name: Running Right Turn
preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Fish Tail, Four Quick Run, Progressive Chasse, Rumba Cross, V6
following_figure_names: Fish Tail (normal; or when ended DC), Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Quarter Turn to Right, Forward Lock, Quick Open Reverse (when ended DC), Tipsy To L (Tipsy to L into 2-12 V6 DC or 2-5 Back Lock down LOD)
notes:
Other alignments:
Across corner: 3/8 on Pivot, 1/2 on Natural Turn, 3/8 on Running Finish.
Two corners: 3/8 on Pivot, 3/8 on Natural Turn, 1/4 on Running Finish
Side of room: 1/2 on pivot, 1/2 on Natural Turn, 3/8 on Running Finish
When 3/8 is made on Running Finish, using "pointing" instead of "facing" at step 9 for Man.
Alternative timing SQQ may be used on steps 5-7, in which case, SQQS will be used on the Running Finish.
